# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiGateways:
  my-api-gateway:
    host: my-api-gateway
    tls:
      certificates:
        - certificate-chain
        - fullchain
        - key
    services:
      microservice1:
        url: https://microservice1.com
        connect_timeout: 5000
        host: microservice1
        protocol: h2

    routes:
      - name: api-route-1
        paths:
          - /api/v1/*
        services: [microservice1]
        strip_path: true
        upstream_host: microservice1
        upstream_port: 8080
        plugins:
          - service-key: SK-microservice1
            name: key-auth
            strip: true

      - name: api-route-2
        paths:
          - /api/v2/*
        services: [microservice2]
        strip_path: true
        upstream_host: microservice2
        upstream_port: 8081
        plugins:
          - service-key: SK-microservice2
            name: key-auth
            strip: true

plugins:
  key-auth:
    consumer_keys:
      SK-microservice1: my-consumer-key-for-microservice1
      SK-microservice2: my-consumer-key-for-microservice2
